full_text:
Chen Ben (Xiuyuan) 陳本 (休元)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Ben (陳本), styledXiuyuan (休元). Unable to vocally defend his father against Liu Ye. Held posts in the Wei government. Chen Ben was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
